---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Larnix — learn AI/ML the fun way, in your browser"
toc: false
section-divs: false
anchor-sections: false
---

::: {.lx-landing}

::: {.lx-hero}
[✦ Free · runs in your browser · ₹0]{.lx-eyebrow .lx-reveal .lx-reveal-1}

# [Learn AI/ML]{} [the fun way.]{.lx-pop} {.lx-reveal .lx-reveal-2}

::: {.lx-lead .lx-reveal .lx-reveal-3}
From "what is AI" to building real machine-learning systems — plain language,
one idea per chapter, and code you actually run. No setup, no fees, no gatekeeping.
:::

::: {.lx-cta .lx-reveal .lx-reveal-4}
[Start learning ▸](modules/00-orientation/ch01-train-your-first-model.qmd){.btn-clay}
[See the roadmap](https://github.com/venkathub/larnix/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md){.btn-clay .btn-clay--ghost}
:::
:::

## The course {.lx-section}

::: {.lx-sub}
Seventeen modules, beginner to frontier. Start at M0 today — more unlock as the
curriculum is authored.
:::

::: {.lx-grid .lx-grid--3}

::: {.lx-course .lx-tile .clay--teal}
::: {.lx-course-top}
[M0]{.lx-coursenum}

### Orientation
:::
Train your first model in your browser — load data, fit a classifier, read its
accuracy. Your first full machine-learning loop.
[🟢 Beginner]{.lx-pill} [▸ Available]{.lx-pill}
:::

::: {.lx-course .lx-tile .clay--amber .lx-course--soon}
::: {.lx-course-top}
[M1]{.lx-coursenum}

### Foundations
:::
The maths and Python you actually need — vectors, probability, and clean code —
taught from zero with runnable examples.
[🟢 Beginner]{.lx-pill} [Soon]{.lx-pill}
:::

::: {.lx-course .lx-tile .clay--coral .lx-course--soon}
::: {.lx-course-top}
[M4]{.lx-coursenum}

### Classical ML
:::
Regression, trees, and ensembles — the workhorses — with honest evaluation and
the "did it actually learn?" habit.
[🟡 Intermediate]{.lx-pill} [Soon]{.lx-pill}
:::

::: {.lx-course .lx-tile .clay--violet .lx-course--soon}
::: {.lx-course-top}
[M7]{.lx-coursenum}

### Transformers & LLMs
:::
Attention, transformers, and how large language models really work — built up
step by step, not hand-waved.
[🔴 Advanced]{.lx-pill} [Soon]{.lx-pill}
:::

::: {.lx-course .lx-tile .clay--sky .lx-course--soon}
::: {.lx-course-top}
[M11]{.lx-coursenum}

### Build your own LLM
:::
The signature capstone — pretrain a small language model end to end, on a free
GPU, with a smaller-model fallback.
[🔴 Advanced]{.lx-pill} [Soon]{.lx-pill}
:::

::: {.lx-course .lx-tile .clay--mint .lx-course--soon}
::: {.lx-course-top}
[M16]{.lx-coursenum}

### Career-ready
:::
Portfolio projects, MLOps, and interview prep — turn what you built into a job.
[🟡 Intermediate]{.lx-pill} [Soon]{.lx-pill}
:::

:::

## Track your progress {.lx-section}

::: {.lx-sub}
No account needed — your quiz scores and finished chapters are saved right in
your browser. Pick up where you left off.
:::

::: {.clay}
::: {.lx-progress}
::: {.lx-track}
::: {.lx-fill}
:::
:::
::: {.lx-steps}
[M0]{.lx-step .lx-step--now} [M1]{.lx-step} [M4]{.lx-step} [M7]{.lx-step} [M11]{.lx-step} [🎓]{.lx-step}
:::
:::
**You're on chapter 1 of the journey.** Finish it to light up M0, then keep going.
:::

## Made for learners like you {.lx-section}

::: {.lx-sub}
Larnix is new — these are the people we built it for, in their own words.
:::

::: {.lx-grid .lx-grid--3}

::: {.lx-quote .lx-tile .clay--coral}
"I switched careers from accounting. I needed something that starts at zero and
doesn't assume I already know calculus."

::: {.lx-who}
[CS]{.lx-avatar style="background:#c92a26"}
::: {}
[The career switcher]{.lx-name}
[wants a clear path, not 40 open tabs]{.lx-role}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.lx-quote .lx-tile .clay--violet}
"My laptop is old and I have no budget. Being able to run real models in the
browser, for free, is the whole reason I can do this."

::: {.lx-who}
[NP]{.lx-avatar style="background:#6d28d9"}
::: {}
[The low-spec beginner]{.lx-name}
[needs it to actually run, at ₹0]{.lx-role}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.lx-quote .lx-tile .clay--sky}
"I'm a CS student tired of tutorials that hand-wave the maths. I want to see
every step and run it myself."

::: {.lx-who}
[DV]{.lx-avatar style="background:#0369a1"}
::: {}
[The curious student]{.lx-name}
[wants depth, and to press Run]{.lx-role}
:::
:::
:::

:::

::: {.lx-cta-band}
## Ready to train your first model?
It takes about twenty minutes, runs in this browser tab, and costs nothing.

[Start Chapter 1 ▸](modules/00-orientation/ch01-train-your-first-model.qmd){.btn-clay .btn-clay--ghost}
:::

:::
